subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! What thou didst write to thy wise child hath been considered, wherefore the response [3.5s]... ...One speck of chastity is greater than a hundred thousand years of worship and a sea of knowledge
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی آنچه بفرزند هوشمند مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید لهذا جواب
subcodes.subjects: @chastity and purity, @role and station of women, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
